api.endpointHint: The API Gateway endpoint from your VoC deployment
api.title: API Configuration

brand.handlesHint: Social media handles and variations to track
brand.title: Brand Configuration
brand.urlsHint: Specific URLs to monitor via web search

categories.aiSuggestionsDescription: Describe your company, industry, or product to get AI-suggested categories tailored to your business.
categories.companyPlaceholder: e.g., We are an airline company offering domestic and international flights. Our customers care about punctuality, comfort, baggage handling, customer service, and in-flight experience...
categories.configureFirst: Configure the API endpoint in the General tab to manage categories.
categories.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this category and all its subcategories? This action cannot be undone.
categories.description: Configure categories and subcategories for feedback classification.
categories.emptyDescription: Use AI generation above or add categories manually below.
categories.generateError: Failed to generate categories. Please try again.
categories.title: Feedback Categories

dangerZone.resetConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all local settings? This will clear your API endpoint, brand configuration, and all local preferences. Backend data will not be affected.
dangerZone.resetDescription: Clear all local configuration. This won't affect backend data.
dangerZone.title: Danger Zone

dataSources.configureFirst: Configure the API endpoint in the General tab to manage data sources.
dataSources.description: Configure API credentials, webhooks, and enable/disable data source schedules.
dataSources.title: Data Sources & Integrations

language.interfaceHint: Controls the dashboard interface language and the language AI uses for chat responses, generated personas, research reports, PRDs, and PR/FAQs. Saved to your browser.
language.reviewHint: All incoming feedback will be translated to this language for analysis and display. The original text is always preserved.
language.title: Language & Locale

logs.configureFirst: Configure the API endpoint in the Brand tab to view logs.
logs.noProcessingErrors: No processing errors in this period
logs.noValidationFailures: No validation failures in this period
logs.title: System Logs

users.configureFirst: Configure the API endpoint in the General tab to manage users.
users.description: Manage users, roles, and permissions for the VoC platform.
users.title: User Administration
